use_cases: Display featured icons to highlight key features or benefits in product showcases
Present visual callouts for service offerings or product capabilities
Enhance UI sections with decorative iconography for improved visual hierarchy
ai_summary: A lightweight featured icon component from the Untitled UI design system that renders visually prominent icons, typically used to draw attention to key features, benefits, or callouts within a user interface. Built with Tailwind CSS for flexible styling and commonly deployed in feature highlight sections, pricing cards, or dashboard layouts.
